name: file-browser
description: Browse and view project files on the server with syntax highlighting

configSchema.label: Allowed Directories
configSchema.description: Comma-separated root directories that can be browsed. All paths must be under these roots.

configSchema.label: Show Hidden Files
configSchema.description: Show files and directories starting with .

configSchema.label: Max File Size (KB)
configSchema.description: Maximum file size to read. Larger files will show metadata only.

configSchema.label: Default Path
configSchema.description: Starting directory when opening the file browser
